title: HandBind
description: A mod that allows you to change your main hand using a bind.
body:
This is a simple mod that adds a modifiable keybind for changing your main hand. This might come handy in PvP, where you want to quickly change your hand for game comfort.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/3VW6py6k0lM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

You can change the keybind using game controls.
![Image of the category in game controls](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71365af30180336c84a38e11a324aa727deadcfb_0.webp)
